requirement_topic.en: Azerishig and Azerenerji Grid Interface for Higher-Power Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 高功率充电的Azerishig和Azerenerji电网接口
requirement_topic.zht: 高功率充電的Azerishig和Azerenerji電網介面

summary.en: Higher-power EV charging installations in Azerbaijan require grid-connection coordination with the distribution or transmission system. Azerishig is the national electricity distribution company responsible for the low- and medium-voltage network; Azerenerji is the state electricity production and transmission operator. Grid review for charging hubs and fast-charging stations may focus on connection capacity, transformer loading, protection, metering, power quality (harmonics, flicker), reactive power compensation, demand management, telemetry, and commissioning acceptance. Project-specific technical conditions must be obtained from the grid operator before installation.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆较大功率电动汽车充电设施需要与配电或输电系统进行并网协调。Azerishig是负责低压和中压配电网的国家配电公司；Azerenerji是国家电力生产和输电运营商。充电站和快充站的电网审查可能聚焦于接入容量、变压器负载、保护、计量、电能质量（谐波、闪变）、无功补偿、需求管理、遥测和投运验收。安装前必须从电网运营商获取项目专用技术条件。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆較大功率電動汽車充電設施需要與配電或輸電系統進行併網協調。Azerishig是負責低壓和中壓配電網的國家配電公司；Azerenerji是國家電力生產和輸電營運商。充電站和快充站的電網審查可能聚焦於接入容量、變壓器負載、保護、計量、電能品質（諧波、閃變）、無功補償、需求管理、遙測和投運驗收。安裝前必須從電網營運商獲取項目專用技術條件。

standards_or_laws: Azerishig JSC grid connection rules and technical conditions
Azerenerji OJSC system-operator requirements where applicable
Azerbaijan electricity law and energy sector regulations
Project-specific power-quality, metering, protection, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China grid studies, load profiles, harmonic reports, charger power-module data, transformer sizing, and protection designs can serve as supporting technical documentation for the Azerbaijan grid-interface review. They do not replace local technical conditions, available capacity checks, or Azerishig / Azerenerji approval for the actual installation site.
summary.zh: 中国并网研究、负荷曲线、谐波报告、充电模块数据、变压器容量设计和保护设计可作为阿塞拜疆电网接口审查的技术支撑文件，但不能替代实际安装站点的本地技术条件、可用容量核查或Azerishig/Azerenerji批准。
summary.zht: 中國併網研究、負荷曲線、諧波報告、充電模組資料、變壓器容量設計和保護設計可作為亞塞拜疆電網介面審查的技術支撐文件，但不能替代實際安裝站點的本地技術條件、可用容量核查或Azerishig/Azerenerji批准。

gap.en: Prepare Azerbaijan site-load forecasts, simultaneity assumptions, harmonic and flicker calculations, transformer and feeder studies, protection coordination, earthing plan, metering design, communication interfaces, emergency shutdown logic, and commissioning procedures. Obtain project-specific technical conditions from Azerishig before design is finalized.
gap.zh: 应准备阿塞拜疆站点负荷预测、同时率假设、谐波和闪变计算、变压器及馈线研究、保护配合、接地方案、计量设计、通信接口、紧急停机逻辑和投运程序。在设计定稿前从Azerishig获取项目专用技术条件。
gap.zht: 應準備亞塞拜疆站點負荷預測、同時率假設、諧波和閃變計算、變壓器及饋線研究、保護配合、接地方案、計量設計、通訊介面、緊急停機邏輯和投運程序。在設計定稿前從Azerishig獲取項目專用技術條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected charging sites requiring technical conditions, distribution connection, transmission interface, metering approval, or commissioning approval from Azerishig or Azerenerji; project-specific for small private chargers
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese grid connection, charger capacity, site category, and local utility requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product conformity certificates do not approve an Azerbaijan charging site for grid connection. Local grid capacity, power quality, protection, metering, and commissioning acceptance from Azerishig or Azerenerji must be handled separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品合格证书不会批准阿塞拜疆充电站点并网。Azerishig或Azerenerji的当地电网容量、电能质量、保护、计量和投运验收必须另行处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品合格證書不會批准亞塞拜疆充電站點併網。Azerishig或Azerenerji的當地電網容量、電能品質、保護、計量和投運驗收必須另行處理。
